summary: Completed comprehensive static code analysis of HabitGen React Native app - Iteration 3 testing 8 new changes (15 test items). TypeScript compilation PASSES. All 45 pytest assertions PASSED. All features correctly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: Test 1 - App Icon & Splash: Android mipmap-* icons exist (all 5 densities). SplashScreen.tsx shows fire emoji (🔥) at line 39 - PASS
Test 2 - RevenueCat Integration: API key 'test_ghPtiGxQAYDDKQKmwpcDeivBIHN', entitlement 'HabitGen Pro', PurchasesOfferings support, onCustomerInfoUpdate listener - PASS
Test 3 - PremiumScreen: Uses RevenueCatUI.Paywall with onPurchaseCompleted/onRestoreCompleted callbacks - PASS
Test 4 - App.tsx PremiumContext: isPremium state, onCustomerInfoUpdate auto-updates, AdBanner hidden for premium - PASS
Test 5 - CreateHabitForm: usePremium hook, premium sees functional difficulty/priority, non-premium sees locked with paywall - PASS
Test 6 - JourneyScreen: Premium no PRO badge/lock icon, opacity 1.0, 'Start' button. Non-premium 0.75 opacity, 'Unlock' - PASS
Test 7 - AccountScreen: Premium sees 'Premium Active', 'Manage Subscription' (presentCustomerCenter), 'Restore'. RevenueCatUI imported - PASS
Test 8 - DurationScrollWheel: Uses onScroll with scrollEventThrottle=16, centeredIndex state for instant highlighting - PASS
Test 9 - TimerScreen Breaks: breakSlots array, slot-based availability (i+1)*30, expiration (i+2)*30, timer pauses isOnBreak - PASS
Test 10 - OnboardingScreen: 4 steps (TOTAL_STEPS=4), step 4 FOCUS_APPS, max 3 apps, Phone/Messages locked as required - PASS
Test 11 - ScreenLockModule.kt: startLockTask, stopLockTask, isInLockTaskMode with @ReactMethod annotations - PASS
Test 12 - ScreenLockPackage.kt: Exists and registered in MainApplication.kt packages list - PASS
Test 13 - AuthContext: RevenueCat logIn/logOut synced with Supabase auth state changes - PASS
Test 14 - Theme Colors: primary #FF2D55 light / #FF375F dark, accent #FF9500 / #FFD60A - PASS
Test 15 - Bundle ID: com.starktechstudio.habitgen in build.gradle namespace, applicationId, and Kotlin packages - PASS

success_rate.backend: N/A - React Native CLI app, no backend

context_for_next_testing_agent: React Native CLI app at /app/HabitGen. No web server - test via 'npx tsc --noEmit' and static analysis. All 8 new changes (15 test items) implemented correctly. MOCKED APIs: RevenueCat (test key), AdMob (placeholder), Screen Lock native module (requires physical device testing).

mocked_integrations.RevenueCat: test API key test_ghPtiGxQAYDDKQKmwpcDeivBIHN - requires actual RevenueCat dashboard configuration for real purchases
mocked_integrations.Google AdMob: placeholder component - no actual SDK integrated
mocked_integrations.Screen Lock: Native Android module implemented but screen pinning requires physical device with proper device admin permissions
mocked_integrations.Google OAuth: Supabase OAuth configured but requires active Supabase project
